name: Salary Register Custom
Upcoming Holidays
report_script:
def execute(filters=None):
    columns = [
        {"label": "Date", "fieldname": "date", "fieldtype": "Date", "width": 120},
        {"label": "Holiday Name", "fieldname": "holiday_name", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 250},
        {"label": "Type", "fieldname": "type", "fieldtype": "Data", "width": 150},
    ]

    today = frappe.utils.today()
    getdate = frappe.utils.getdate

    employee = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Employee", {"user_id": frappe.session.user}, ["name", "company"], as_dict=True
    )
    if not employee:
        return columns, []

    rows = []

    default_holiday_list = frappe.db.get_value("Company", employee.company, "default_holiday_list")
    if default_holiday_list:
        national_holidays = frappe.get_all(
            "Holiday",
            filters={"parent": default_holiday_list, "holiday_date": [">=", today], "weekly_off": 0},
            fields=["holiday_date as date", "description as holiday_name"],
            order_by="holiday_date asc",
        )
        for h in national_holidays:
            h["type"] = "National Holiday"
            rows.append(h)

    optional_list = frappe.db.get_value(
        "Leave Period", {"company": employee.company, "is_active": 1}, "optional_holiday_list"
    )
    if optional_list:
        optional_holidays = frappe.get_all(
            "Holiday",
            filters={"parent": optional_list, "holiday_date": [">=", today]},
            fields=["holiday_date as date", "description as holiday_name"],
            order_by="holiday_date asc",
        )
        for h in optional_holidays:
            h["type"] = "Optional Holiday"
            rows.append(h)

    rows.sort(key=lambda r: getdate(r["date"]))
    rows = rows[:5]

    for r in rows:
        r["holiday_name"] = frappe.utils.strip_html(r["holiday_name"]).strip()

    return columns, rows
data = execute(filters)
